en_title: 'This Is Borderline Evil' - Minecraft Creator Speaks Out Against ESA Calling Private Servers 'Illegal'
cn_title: 《我的世界》创始人痛批ESA：称私服非法「近乎邪恶」
subtitle: 别拿我的作品害人
opus_summary: 《我的世界》创始人Notch反对ESA称私人服务器「非法」的说法，称这种做法「极其卑劣」且「近乎邪恶」。ESA随后给出更新声明，弱化了此前评论的绝对语气。

paragraphs.en: Minecraft creator Markus 'Notch' Persson has spoken out against the Electronic Software Association for claiming that the game's private servers are "illegal."
paragraphs.cn: 《我的世界》创始人Markus「Notch」Persson发声反对Entertainment Software Association，原因是后者声称该游戏的私人服务器「非法」。

paragraphs.en: Earlier this month, the California State Senate held a hearing regarding Stop Killing Games-backed bill known as the Protect Our Games Act. The bill aims to obligate publishers to find ways to make games playable, even after ending support for them. That would mean that live-service games would need to have some kind of functionality after servers are shut down. The subject of private servers was brought up as a feasible solution and cited Minecraft as a prominent example, to which ESA’s VP of State Government Affairs, Jennifer Gibbons, countered with a head-scratching argument.
paragraphs.cn: 本月早些时候，加利福尼亚州参议院就一项由Stop Killing Games支持、名为《保护我们的游戏法案》的法案举行了听证。该法案旨在要求发行商即使在结束支持游戏后，也要找到让游戏继续可玩的方式。这意味着服务型游戏在服务器关闭后仍需要保留某种功能。私人服务器被提出为一种可行解决方案，并以《我的世界》作为典型例子；对此，ESA州政府事务副总裁Jennifer Gibbons提出了令人费解的反驳。

paragraphs.en: Gibbons claimed that these private servers are actually "illegal", a form of "piracy", and, in the case of Minecraft, are unsanctioned by Microsoft. Gibbons went as far as comparing them to a gaming "black market." None of this is true in the case of Minecraft, as its official website gives players the tools to create their own private servers and even boasts a browser filled with custom servers. It's actively encouraged by Mojang.
paragraphs.cn: Gibbons声称，这些私人服务器实际上是「非法」的，是一种「盗版」，而且就《我的世界》而言，并未得到微软批准。Gibbons甚至把它们比作游戏「黑市」。至少在《我的世界》的案例中，这些说法都不正确，因为该游戏官方网站为玩家提供了创建私人服务器的工具，甚至还拥有一个塞满自定义服务器的浏览器。Mojang实际上是在主动鼓励这种玩法。

paragraphs.en: Notch, the creator of Minecraft, spoke out against these comments, despite no longer working on the franchise.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管Notch已经不再参与这个系列，但这位《我的世界》创作者仍然发声反对这些评论。

paragraphs.en: "I'm not part of either any more, but I feel like the ESA is being incredibly scummy by pulling this," he said. "I've never liked them, but even less so now. I did not wish for my work to be used against people. This is borderline evil."
paragraphs.cn: 他说：「我已经不属于其中任何一方了，但我觉得ESA这么做真的极其卑劣。我从来都不喜欢他们，现在更不喜欢了。我不希望自己的作品被用来对付人们。这近乎邪恶。」

paragraphs.en: The ESA provided IGN with two statements on the matter yesterday, one that largely reaffirmed the comments made by Gibbons and another that softened things. Below is the updated statement, which walks back some of the definitive-ness of Gibbons' original comments.
paragraphs.cn: ESA昨天向IGN提供了两份关于此事的声明，其中一份大体重申了Gibbons的说法，另一份则缓和了措辞。下面是更新后的声明，它收回了Gibbons最初评论中的一些绝对语气。

paragraphs.en: "Private servers that host or distribute copyrighted game content without authorization infringe on the intellectual property (IP) rights of game publishers. While publishers may take different approaches, all publishers reserve the right to exercise their rights against IP infringement. The provision in CA AB 1921 that proposed these servers as a legitimate alternative to keep games running raises concerns about a publisher's ability to enforce their IP rights. In addition, private servers operate with no oversight from the publisher and do not uphold the same trust and safety standards. This could create an unsafe environment for players and be counter to the industry's commitment to fostering safe and fun game play for all players."
paragraphs.cn: 「未经授权托管或分发受版权保护游戏内容的私人服务器，侵犯了游戏发行商的知识产权（IP）权利。虽然不同发行商可能采取不同做法，但所有发行商都保留针对IP侵权行为行使权利的权利。CA AB 1921中把这些服务器作为让游戏继续运行的合法替代方案的条款，引发了人们对发行商执行其IP权利能力的担忧。此外，私人服务器在没有发行商监督的情况下运行，也不维持同样的信任与安全标准。这可能为玩家创造不安全的环境，并与行业为所有玩家营造安全、有趣游戏体验的承诺相悖。」
